mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.campaign_id, r.user_id, r.title, r.content, r.thumbnail_name, c.time_segment, (CASE WHEN c.type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN c.type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN c.type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_Nm, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r LEFT OUTER JOIN campaign c ON r.campaign_id = c.campaign_id ORDER BY review_id desc LIMIT 30

SELECT r.review_id, r.campaign_id, r.user_id, u.user_nm, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.thumbnail_name, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r LEFT OUTER JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id Where review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO review ( campaign_id, user_id, title,
address, thumbnail_name, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{campaignId}, #{userId}, #{title},
#{address}, #{thumbnailName}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: SELECT c.campaign_id, c.campaign_title, c.leader_code, c.place_addr, c.campaign_pay, u.user_id as leader_id, u.user_nm as leader_nm, u.id, u.role, (CASE WHEN u.guard_type = '02' THEN '경호' ELSE 'X' END) AS guard_type FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN user u ON c.LEADER_CODE = u.id WHERE CAMPAIGN_ID = #{campaignId}
SELECT r.review_id FROM review r Where campaign_id = #{campaignId}
